comments.Batch ID:
Column Name: BATCH_ID

Data Type: VARCHAR2(200 CHAR)

Description: An optional identifier, if provided while scheduling an import process is used to identify which interface table records will be picked up for processing.
comments.Import Action *:
Column Name: IMPORT_ACTION*

Data Type: VARCHAR2(10 CHAR)

Description: Indicates whether the record to be imported needs to be created or an existing record should be updated. Valid values are CREATE or UPDATE.
comments.Supplier Name*:
Column Name: VENDOR_NAME*

DataType: VARCHAR2(360 CHAR)

Description: Supplier name. 

Functional key. Should be provided for CREATE or UPDATE  Import Action.
comments.Tax Organization Type:
Column Name: ORGANIZATION_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE*

Data Type: VARCHAR2(30 CHAR)

Description: Tax organization type code.

Import Actions Supported: CREATE, UPDATE.

Attribute value is mandatory for CREATE action.

To find a valid Tax Organization Type:
1. Navigate to Setup and Maintenance.
2. Search and go to task Manage Tax Organization Type Lookup.
3. Use the lookup code from the list of lookup codes that are active and populate in this column (note that the value should be enabled and active).
comments.Supplier Type:
Column Name: VENDOR_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE

Data Type: VARCHAR2(30 CHAR)

Description: Supplier type. 

Import Actions Supported: CREATE, UPDATE.

To find a valid Supplier Type:
1. Navigate to Setup and Maintenance.
2. Search and go to task Manage Supplier Type Lookup.
3. Use the lookup code from the list of lookup codes that are active and populate in this column (note that the value should be enabled and active).
comments.Business Relationship*:
Column Name: BUSINESS_RELATIONSHIP

Data Type: VARCHAR2(30 CHAR)

Description: Business relationship of the enterprise with the supplier. Valid values are PROSPECTIVE and SPEND_AUTHORIZED only.

Import Action Supported: CREATE
comments.D-U-N-S Number:
Column Name: DUNS_NUMBER

Data Type: VARCHAR2(30 CHAR)

Description: D-U-N-S Number.

Import Actions Supported: CREATE, UPDATE.
comments.Taxpayer Country:
Column Name: TAX_COUNTRY_CODE

DataType: VARCHAR2(2 CHAR)

Description: Tax country code. 

Import Actions Supported: CREATE, UPDATE.

To find a valid Taxpayer Country:
1. Navigate to Setup and Maintenance
2. Search and navigate to task Manage Territories
3. Find the desired country and select the Territory Code for the country and provide in this column (note that the value should be enabled and not obsolete).
comments.Taxpayer ID:
Column Name: NUM_1099

Data Type: VARCHAR2(30 CHAR)

Description: Taxpayer Identification Number(1099).

Import Actions Supported: CREATE, UPDATE.
comments.Payment Method:
Column Name: PAYMENT_METHOD_LOOKUP_CODE

DataType: VARCHAR2(30 CHAR)

Description: Default Payment method code.

Import Actions Supported: CREATE, UPDATE.

To find a valid Payment Method:
1. Navigate to Setup and Maintenance.
2. Search and go to task Manage Payment Methods.
3. Search for Status Active and Payables as Yes
4. Choose the desired code from the list of codes that are available.

NOTE: Don't use this for payment method with Payment Mode as Virtual card.
comments.Bank Instruction 1:
Column Name: BANK_INSTRUCTION1_CODE

Data Type: VARCHAR2(30 CHAR)

Description: Default instruction to the bank on how to execute payment.

Import Actions Supported: CREATE, UPDATE.

To find valid bank instruction code:
1. Navigate to Setup and Maintenance.
2. Search on the Manage Payment Codes task.
3. Click the Go to Task icon.
4. In the Search region on the Manage Payment Codes  page, select Bank instruction from the Type choice list.
5. To view valid bank instruction payment codes, click the Search button on the Manage Payment Codes page.
comments.Payment Text Message 1:
Column Name: PAYMENT_TEXT_MESSAGE1

Data Type: VARCHAR2(256 CHAR)

Description: Default text message that appers in the payment file that is sent to the bank.

Import Actions Supported: CREATE or UPDATE.
comments.Payment Text Message 2:
Column Name: PAYMENT_TEXT_MESSAGE2

Data Type: VARCHAR2(256 CHAR)

Description: Additional text message that can be included in the payment file sent to the bank.

Import Actions Supported: CREATE or UPDATE.
